meaning: n.理想adj.理想的,完美的,想象的,观念的,唯心论的
examples: He has found his ideal mate.
We do not live in an ideal world.
I know it's not ideal but there you go...
The open conditions of the frontier were ideal for Jewish merchants, like the Goldwaters of Phoenix.
Having a car is ideal, although cycling is sometimes necessary because of parking restrictions.
